title: Personalised With Your Own Image Wedding, Friendship, Valentine/Mothers Day Landscape And Portrait Novelty Globe Snow Glitter Photo Frame.

features: This Can Be Personalised With A Picture/Photo Of Your Choice To Make It The Perfect Gift For You Or Someone Special For Any Occasion.
Make Your Photo Sparkle & Shine With This Decorative Photo Frame.

Free Standing Frame Which Works With Both Landscape & Portrait Photos. Holds 4” X 6" Inch Photos And Is Easily Interchangeable. No Cutting Required. Insert Your Very Own Picture Easily In Just 10 Seconds.
Design Allows Easy Placement In Your Home Or Office. Material: Acrylic/Plastic. - Shape – Rectangular. - Dimensions - 20 X 160 X 110 Millimetres.

Would Make A Great Gift For Valentine Day, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, Christmas Stocking, Secret Santa, Gift For Kids,Boyfriend,Girlfriend,Brother,Sister,Grandma,Grandpa,Uncle,Aunt,Step Mother, Step Father, Photo Frame, Glitter Photo Frame, Fun Blox.
